# Juan

## About
- Name: Juan
- Role: Founder and builder shipping products in security, defense, and AI
- GitHub: https://github.com/0xjgv/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jgv/
- Website: https://0xjgv.space/

## Projects

### Stilgar — EU Defense Procurement Intelligence
- URL: https://usestilgar.com/
- Problem: 41.8% of EU defense tenders receive a single bid because suppliers never find them.
- Solution: Monitors 30+ sources across 5 countries and delivers structured, English-language tender intelligence so defense suppliers can compete.

### Inconnu — Zero-Trust Bridge for RAG
- URL: https://inconnu.ai/
- Problem: RAG systems access sensitive data without proper security boundaries.
- Solution: Zero-trust security layer between RAG pipelines and data sources.

### Fredirect — URL Intelligence
- URL: https://sentinel-fredirect.vercel.app/
- Problem: Harmful and fake links exploit URL redirects for phishing and impersonation.
- Solution: Tracks and analyzes redirect chains to surface threats before they reach users.

### Harness — Quality Guardrails for AI Coding Agents
- URL: https://github.com/0xjgv/harness
- Problem: AI coding agents generate code without consistent structure or quality standards.
- Solution: Opinionated project templates with built-in guardrails so agents produce reliable, maintainable code from the start.

### Wando — Security Checklist for Teams
- URL: https://wando.vercel.app/
- Problem: Teams lack actionable security guidance.
- Solution: Curated, practical security and privacy recommendations teams can actually follow.
